name: mochi
description: Mochi is a small, fast, embeddable programming language designed for agents, data, and AI. It combines functional syntax, stream-first semantics, and native support for datasets, graphs, and simulation.
summaryZh: Mochi is a small, fast, embeddable programming language designed for agents, data, and AI. It combines functional syntax, stream-first semantics, and native support for datasets, graphs, and simulation. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
